SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class RetrievalStrategy

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.RetrievalStrategy
Direct Known Subclasses:
IndexRetrievalStrategy, NameRetrievalStrategy
public abstract class RetrievalStrategy extends Object
Abstract class to define the column value retrieval strategy.

The ResultSet interface provides getter methods (getBoolean, getLong, and so on) for retrieving column values from the current row. Values can be retrieved using either the index number of the column or the name of the column. In general, using the column index will be more efficient. Columns are numbered from 1. For maximum portability, result set columns within each row should be read in left-to-right order, and each column should be read only once. JPA-LiTE provides two strategies for fetching column values from within a ResultSet object.

  • IndexRetrievalStrategy
  • NameRetrievalStrategy
Both have their own pros aand cons. But baased on the hint provided, appropriate strategy will be picked up at runtime.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Details

    • derive

      public static RetrievalStrategy derive(Map<String,Object> hints)
      Return the appropriate retrieval strategy. Retrieval strategy is based on the query hint provided by client. If no strategy is specified by user, then the default strategy will be returned.
      Parameters:
      hints -
      Returns:
      RetrievalStrategy

    • relAttribute

      protected List<RelAttribute> relAttribute(ClassDescriptor desc, Map<String,Object> hints)
      Return the attribute definition of the relationship mapping (only if the said attribute is present).
      Parameters:
      desc -
      hints -
      Returns:
      RelAttribute

    • fetch

      protected abstract <T> List<T> fetch(ResultSet resultSet, Class<T> clazz, int limit, Map<String,Object> hints) throws SQLException
      Apply the appropriate strategy and fetch the result from the underlying resultset.
      Type Parameters:
      T -
      Parameters:
      resultSet - The DB result set that will be iterated over to extraact the field value(s) and populaate the placeholder.
      clazz - The entity class name.
      limit - Maximum number of records to be returned.
      hints - Optional query hint provided by user.
      Returns:
      List
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • binder

      protected List<Binder> binder(List<RelAttribute> rels)
      Return the appropriate binder object.
      Parameters:
      rels -
      Returns:
      Binder[]
